metadata.name: Grafana
metadata.description: Open-source observability platform for visualizing and analyzing metrics, logs, and traces from various data sources through flexible, customizable dashboards.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Open-source observability platform for visualizing and analyzing metrics, logs, and traces from various data sources through flexible, customizable dashboards.

## How to Use
This template renders `compose.yaml` and `.env` as files.

1. Decide on service names, ports, volumes, credentials, and optional integrations before rendering the stack.
2. Fill in the required variables first, then enable optional sections such as Traefik, metrics, or extra services only when needed.
3. Render the Compose project, review the generated files, and start it with Docker Compose in the target directory.

## Variable Guide
### General
- `service_name`: Name of the service; optional; default: grafana.
- `restart_policy`: Policy used for Restart; required; default: unless-stopped; options: unless-stopped, always, on-failure, no.

### Ports
- `ports_http`: Host port exposed for HTTP; optional; default: 3000.

### Authentik
- `authentik_enabled`: Enable Authentik SSO integration; optional; default: false.
- `authentik_url`: URL used for Authentik; required; default: https://auth.home.arpa; shown when: authentik_enabled=true.
- `authentik_slug`: Value used for the authentik settings; required; default: grafana; shown when: authentik_enabled=true.
- `authentik_client_id`: Identifier for the authentik client; required; shown when: authentik_enabled=true.
- `authentik_client_secret`: Secret value for the authentik client; required; shown when: authentik_enabled=true.

### Traefik
- `traefik_enabled`: Enable Traefik integration; optional; default: false.
- `traefik_host`: Hostname used for Traefik; optional.
- `traefik_domain`: Domain used for Traefik; required.
- `traefik_network`: Network used for Traefik; required; default: traefik.
- `traefik_tls_enabled`: Enable Traefik TLS; optional; default: false.
- `traefik_tls_certresolver`: Traefik Tls Certresolver; required; default: cloudflare; shown when: traefik_tls_enabled=true.

### Database
- `database_type`: Database engine to use; optional; options: sqlite, postgres.
- `database_external`: Use external database; optional; default: false; shown when: database_type=postgres.
- `database_name`: Name of the database; optional; default: grafana; shown when: database_type=postgres.
- `database_user`: Username for the database; optional; default: grafana; shown when: database_type=postgres.
- `database_password`: Password for the database; required; shown when: database_type=postgres.
- `database_host`: Hostname used for Database; required; shown when: database_type=postgres and database_external=true.

## References
- [Grafana](https://grafana.com/)
- [Documentation](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/grafana/grafana)

## Next Steps
Log in with the initial admin user:
```bash
Username: admin
Password: admin
```
